name: Tower Defense ASCII
description: Un juego Tower Defense clásico con gráficos ASCII animados, desarrollado con HTML5, CSS3 y JavaScript vanilla. Juega directamente en tu navegador sin necesidad de instalación.

icons.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 192 192'><rect fill='%230f0f1e' width='192' height='192'/><text x='50%' y='50%' font-size='80' fill='%2300ff00' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central' font-family='monospace' font-weight='bold'>[T]</text></svg>

data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 512 512'><rect fill='%230f0f1e' width='512' height='512'/><text x='50%' y='50%' font-size='200' fill='%2300ff00' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central' font-family='monospace' font-weight='bold'>[T]</text></svg>

screenshots.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 540 720'><rect fill='%230f0f1e' width='540' height='720'/><text x='10' y='50' font-size='16' fill='%2300ff00' font-family='monospace'>TOWER DEFENSE ASCII</text><text x='10' y='100' font-size='12' fill='%2300ff00' font-family='monospace'>NIVEL: 5 | VIDAS: 15 | ORO: 350</text></svg>
